examples: They lay snug and warm amid the blankets and watched their sister hard at work.
The squat pen rests as snug as a gun.
Each has a snug mezzanine area and an antler-fenced balcony about eight metres above ground.
We docked the motorboat and I climbed into the makoro, the sides snug around me.
Sollers is shut up in his study, writing (pinkly snug and warm inside his turtleneck sweater).
